description: A terrain patch entry inside a PrefabDef. The containing element name is the TerrainDef defName (the 'def' field). Entries with empty rects are ignored at runtime.

def.label: Terrain
def.description: TerrainDef defName. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability this terrain patch is placed (0-1). Defaults to 1.

color.label: Color def
color.description: ColorDef applied to the terrain tiles in this patch.

rects.label: Rects
rects.description: List of cell rectangles to paint with this terrain. Each <li> is a CellRect in compact '(x, z, width, height)' format. Entries with empty rects are ignored at runtime.
